programme.title: Mercenary
programme.desc: An electronics mogul (John Ritter) coerces a former commander (Olivier Gruner) into helping him find the terrorist who killed his wife.

programme.title: Game of Death
programme.desc: Framed for murder, an agent (Wesley Snipes) must dodge assassins while trying to clear his name.

programme.title: The Medallion
programme.desc: Eddie (Jackie Chan) is an indomitable Hong Kong cop who, after a near fatal accident involving a mysterious medallion, is suddenly transformed into a Highbinder -- an immortal warrior with inhuman powers. programme.title: Ram Balram
programme.desc: Jagatpal lies to raise Ram and Balram after killing their parents.

programme.title: Rafoo Chakkar
programme.desc: When forced to get married, the four main characters run away from their homes ending up in hilarious situations.

programme.title: Mr. Natwarlal
programme.desc: Natwar seeks revenge on Vikram for framing his brother.

programme.title: Patthar Ke Sanam
programme.desc: Meena's life changes when her rich father hires a new manager. Both Meena and her best friend fall in love with him.

programme.title: Ramkali
programme.desc: Sultan, an inspector turned fugitive bandit, teams up with dancer Ramkali alias Raksha to seek revenge on Shankar Singh.

programme.title: Mastana
programme.desc: Satya befriends rich child, parents intervene, child falls ill. Heartwarming tale of friendship and love.

programme.desc: Pardoned Face's book-promotion TV tour hits a snag when a Viet Cong general seeks revenge for his jilted daughter.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A retired bullfighter credited with saving a young man from a bull arranges the death of the boy's father to protect his own reputation.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A magician claims an airtight alibi -- being sealed in a tank of water -- in the murder of a blackmailing associate.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo's prime suspect in the case of a drowned yacht magnate also turns up dead.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An egotistic TV detective matches wits with Columbo after murdering his producer, a former lover and current blackmailer.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The curator (Joyce Van Patten) of a strapped family-owned museum stages a robbery, for insurance, then murders to hide her crime; guests Celeste Holm, Tim O'Connor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An accountant, embezzling to support his wife's lifestyle, murders his partner after the man discovers his crimes.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A mystery writer uses her plot as a guide to murder her nephew, whom she blames for her niece's death.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a gourmet restaurant owner who had been the victim of an extortionist.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A TV-network executive murders her boss and lover when he fails to promote her.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo suspects a psychologist (Nicol Williamson), a noted expert in mind control, is guilty of murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An Irish poet, who fronts a peace organization while secretly running guns, kills an arms dealer who tries to swindle him.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood director tries to fool Columbo when a studio becomes a murder scene.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant major at a training camp.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Homicide detective Lieutenant Columbo investigates the murder of a famous painter's ex-wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the disappearance of the director of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The disheveled detective investigates the apparent suicide of a notorious racketeer who was facing an indictment.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: When a crooked estate agent dies in prison, his widow vows to exact her revenge on the two men that put him there. After killing her husband's informing boss, she sets her sights on Lieutenant Columbo.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A dentist frames his wife for a murder in order to keep up his image and expensive lifestyle.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a crime show host's rival with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is put to the test against an equally brilliant, criminal defense lawyer who murders his rock star girlfriend.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo attends his nephew's wedding and as the couple get ready to leave on their honeymoon, the bride disappears; Columbo investigates and suspects his nephew may have made a few enemies on the police force.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a hit-and-run, followed by a car explosion.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Two women kill their two-timing lover but have solid alibis; one of the women tries to seduce Columbo to keep him off her trail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a case involving argumentative radio talk show host Fielding Chase.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is put on the case of a man who murders his brother.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo matches wits with a forensics specialist, helping his girlfriend to frame her husband for a stockbroker's murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The inimitable cop must prove that a flamboyant Hollywood gossip reporter was murdered by her former lover.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter in the Los Angeles rave scene.

programme.title: Prescription: murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist uses a patient, he is having an affair with to help him kill his wife. His perfect alibi may come apart at the hands of a seemingly befuddled LAPD lieutenant.

programme.title: Ransom for a Dead Man
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo (Peter Falk) outwits a lawyer (Lee Grant) who has killed her husband but made it look like a kidnapping.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: No body, no weapon and a witness courted by the war hero she thinks committed murder, complicate a case.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is caught in a case of stolen art and murder with evidence pointing to an innocent woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A competition between bitter siblings for ownership of a family-owned corporation, after their father's untimely death, escalates into murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An explosion kills an executive as he calls his wife from a car phone, and suspicion falls on a company attorney.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo excavates the area surrounding the newly poured foundation of a building to search for a corpse.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A botanical collector involves his nephew in a kidnapping to break a trust fund, then murders him to finance his hobby.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The mistress of a conductor becomes a target for murder after threatening to tell all to her lover's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A football-team manager (Robert Culp) establishes an electronic alibi for the murder of the team owner (Dean Stockwell) during a game; guests Valerie Harper, Susan Howard, James Gregory, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo journeys to London to observe Scotland Yard, but winds up investigating murders committed by two Shakespearean actors.

programme.title: Virus
programme.desc: Passengers (Jamie Lee Curtis, William Baldwin, Donald Sutherland) on a sinking ship board a seemingly deserted Russian vessel containing a mutating alien force.","large":"Caught in a typhoon, a tugboat commanded by Robert Everton (Donald Sutherland) comes across a mysterious near-deserted ship. Excited to find a vessel that could be sold for as much as $30 million, Everton and his crew board and prepare to move the craft, despite the warnings of sole survivor Nadia Vinogradova (Joanna Pacula). When a malevolent alien presence begins killing off the crew, navigator Kit Foster (Jamie Lee Curtis) tries to convince the rest of them to leave before it's too late.

programme.title: Visions
programme.desc: After moving to a vineyard with her family, a pregnant woman experiences horrifying visions.

programme.title: Wer
programme.desc: In France, an American female attorney (A.J. Cook) defends a murder suspect who has a brutish appearance and a deadly secret.

programme.title: White Noise 2: The Light
programme.desc: After nearly being killed along with his family, a man recovers and realizes that he can sense when someone is about to die.","large":"A man's family is killed, but he survives -- barely. After recovering, he realizes that he has changed in some way: He now senses when someone is about to die. In his attempts to save people who are near death, he discovers there is a price to pay for interfering with the cosmos.

programme.title: The Wilding
programme.desc: A family tries to start over following a daughter's release from a mental health institution.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet Dr. Jekyll & Mr. Hyde
programme.desc: Policemen Slim (Bud Abbott) and Tubby (Lou Costello) go to London and meet a doctor (Boris Karloff) and his evil alter ego.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet Frankenstein
programme.desc: Dracula (Bela Lugosi) wants to put porter's (Lou Costello) brain in monster's body.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Invisible Man
programme.desc: Two detective-school graduates (Bud Abbott, Lou Costello) help a framed boxer who can make himself disappear.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Killer, Boris Karloff
programme.desc: A hotel detective (Bud Abbott) and bellhop (Lou Costello) find dead bodies and a fake swami (Boris Karloff).

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Mummy
programme.desc: Two guys stuck in Egypt follow a medallion to the crypt of Kharis.

programme.title: The Andromeda Strain
programme.desc: Scientists (Arthur Hill, David Wayne, James Olson) rush to isolate an alien germ brought back by a space probe.","large":"Chilling tale about a US research satellite carrying a deadly extraterrestrial microscopic organism that crashes into a small town in Arizona. A group of top scientists are hurriedly assembled in a bid to identify and contain the lethal stowaway. Based on the novel by Michael Crichton.

programme.title: The Black Cat
programme.desc: Stranded Budapest honeymooners follow a mad doctor (Bela Lugosi) to a black-lipped architect's (Boris Karloff) Art Deco manor.

programme.title: The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
programme.desc: A boy (Scott Sealey) upset by his parents' divorce must also tell the sheriff his father (Kerwin Mathews) is a werewolf.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein (Colin Clive) creates a hissing, frizzy-haired female (Elsa Lanchester) for his other monster (Boris Karloff).","large":"After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: The Brides of Dracula
programme.desc: Van Helsing (Peter Cushing) drives a stake through the heart of a vampire baron (David Peel) who even bites his own mother (Martita Hunt).

programme.title: The Car
programme.desc: A Western deputy sheriff (James Brolin) chases a driverless black car that keeps running people down.","large":"Two bicyclists are run down by a strange black car in the desert near a small town in Utah. But this is just the first in a series of hit-and-run murders. Sheriff Wade Parents (James Brolin) is called in to investigate, and his deputy, Everett (John Marley), is killed by the black sedan, which, some witnesses say, has no one behind its wheel. When the car threatens a local school parade, the lives of the town's children and Wade's teacher girlfriend, Lauren (Kathleen Lloyd), are endangered.

programme.title: Creature From the Black Lagoon
programme.desc: Fossil hunters (Richard Carlson, Julia Adams, Richard Denning) encounter a dangerous, humanlike amphibian in the Amazon.","large":"Remnants of a mysterious animal have come to light in a remote jungle, and a group of scientists intends to determine if the find is an anomaly or evidence of an undiscovered beast. To accomplish their goal, the scientists (Antonio Moreno, Richard Carlson, Richard Denning, Whit Bissell) must brave the most perilous pieces of land South America has to offer. But the terrain is nothing compared to the danger posed by an otherworldly being that endangers their work and their lives.

programme.title: The Creature Walks Among Us
programme.desc: Scientists (Jeff Morrow, Rex Reason) capture the creature from the black lagoon and turn him into an air breather.

programme.title: Curse of the Undead
programme.desc: A cow-town preacher (Eric Fleming) shoots a custom bullet at a vampire gunfighter (Michael Pate) in the Old West.

programme.title: The Curse of the Werewolf
programme.desc: The son of a servant assaulted by a beggar becomes a wolfman in 18th-century Spain.

programme.title: Curucu, Beast of the Amazon
programme.desc: A doctor (Beverly Garland) and an adventurer (John Bromfield) head for the Amazon, where a guy (Tom Payne) in a bird suit is scaring natives.

programme.title: The Deadly Mantis
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Craig Stevens) and a paleontologist (William Hopper) track a huge praying mantis from the North Pole to Manhattan.

programme.title: Dr. Cyclops
programme.desc: A mad doctor (Albert Dekker) in Peru reduces a woman (Janice Logan) and three men to one-fifth their normal size.","large":"To assist with his work due to his failing eyesight, renowned biologist Dr. Alexander Thorkel invites two prominent scientists and a mineralogist to his hidden Amazon jungle laboratory. Thorkel remains evasive about the nature of his experiments, and after the team evaluates his bacteria slides, he orders them away. When they refuse, Thorkel and his servant trick them into a chamber where Thorkel shrinks them down to microscopic size, and they escape to the terrifying jungle.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: A real-estate man (Dwight Frye) visits the Transylvania castle of a 500-year-old vampire (Bela Lugosi).","large":"The dashing, mysterious Count Dracula (Bela Lugosi), after hypnotizing a British soldier, Renfield (Dwight Frye), into his mindless slave, travels to London and takes up residence in an old castle. Soon Dracula begins to wreak havoc, sucking the blood of young women and turning them into vampires. When he sets his sights on Mina (Helen Chandler), the daughter of a prominent doctor, vampire-hunter Van Helsing (Edward Van Sloan) is enlisted to put a stop to the count's never-ending bloodlust.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: Van Helsing (Laurence Olivier) investigates as the vampire count (Frank Langella) scales walls and visits bedrooms at an English manor.","large":"A man washes ashore in England after a shipwreck and is found by Mina Van Helsing (Jan Francis). The man introduces himself as Count Dracula (Frank Langella) of Transylvania, and proceeds to integrate himself into the lives of Mina and her friend Lucy Seward (Kate Nelligan). However, when Mina dies and her father, Prof. Van Helsing (Laurence Olivier), attributes her death to a vampire, evidence indicates that Count Dracula is the monster, and Lucy is his next target.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: This was made at night using the same sets and script as the Bela Lugosi classic but with a Spanish cast.","large":"Soon after beginning work for Conde Dracula (Carlos Villarias), the clerk Renfield (Pablo Alvarez Rubio) learns that his employer is, in fact, a vampire who lives on human blood. Now under Dracula's spell, Renfield helps his master travel to London, where the vampire takes another victim (Carmen Guerrero). Dracula also has eyes on the lovely Eva (Lupita Tovar), but her fiancé, Juan Harker (Barry Norton), and a wise professor named Van Helsing (Eduardo Arozamena) seek to stop him.

programme.title: Dracula's Daughter
programme.desc: A vampire countess (Gloria Holden) in black falls in love with a psychologist (Otto Kruger) and kidnaps his fiancée (Marguerite Churchill).","large":"Although Count Dracula was destroyed by Van Helsing (Edward Van Sloan), who is now being tried for his murder, Dracula's daughter, the Countess Marya Zaleska (Gloria Holden), is still alive -- and her father's death has brought her no closer to eradicating her vampiric thirst for blood. When attempts to free herself of the disease fail, she turns to psychiatrist Dr. Garth (Otto Kruger) for assistance, but soon finds herself struggling with the desire to make him one of the undead as well.

programme.title: The Evil of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron (Peter Cushing) and a hypnotist (Peter Woodthorpe) bring the creature out of ice, horrifying villagers of Karlsbad.","large":"Dr. Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) returns destitute to his home village to recommence his experimental research into the reanimation of dead tissue, and stumbles upon his old monster suspended in ice. Though he revives the creature, Frankenstein must seek the help of hypnotist Zoltan (Peter Woodthorpe) to repair its mind. Zoltan then assumes control of the monster, using him to wreak havoc. But when Frankenstein tries to regain power over his creation, he becomes Zoltan's next target.

programme.title: Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein creates a monster from cadavers and a killer's brain.

programme.title: Frankenstein Meets the Wolfman
programme.desc: Tormented werewolf Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney Jr.) calls on Dr. Frankenstein and finds his monster (Bela Lugosi) instead.","large":"Lawrence Stewart Talbot (Lon Chaney Jr.) is plagued by a physical oddity that turns him into a crazed werewolf after sundown. His desire to rid himself of this ailment leads him to the castle owned by mad scientist Dr. Frankenstein. Frankenstein, it turns out, is now dead, yet Talbot believes that the scientist's daughter, Baroness Elsa Frankenstein (Ilona Massey), can help him. However, his quest to right himself puts him on a collision course with Frankenstein's monster (Bela Lugosi).

programme.title: The Frozen Ghost
programme.desc: When famous radio hypnotist Alex Gregor (Lon Chaney Jr.) accidentally causes the death of an audience member during a broadcast, his guilt leads him to break off his engagement to Maura Daniel (Evelyn Ankers) and take a job at a wax museum.","large":"When famous radio hypnotist Alex Gregor (Lon Chaney Jr.) accidentally causes the death of an audience member during a broadcast, his guilt leads him to break off his engagement to Maura Daniel (Evelyn Ankers) and take a job at a wax museum. Jealousy over the attention paid to his new co-worker causes mentally unbalanced sculptor Rudi Poldan (Martin Kosleck) to lash out at museum owner Valerie Monet (Tala Birell) and her niece Nina (Elena Verdugo) in a horrifying fashion.

programme.title: The Funhouse
programme.desc: Naughty teens (Elizabeth Berridge, Cooper Huckabee, Miles Chapin) are locked in a carnival fun house with a man in a Frankenstein mask.","large":"Rebellious teen Amy (Elizabeth Berridge) defies her parents by going to a trashy carnival that has pulled into town. In tow are her boyfriend, Buzz (Cooper Huckabee), and their friends Liz (Largo Woodruff) and Richie (Miles Chapin). Thinking it would be fun to spend the night in the campy Funhouse horror ride, the teens witness a murder by a deformed worker wearing a mask. Locked in, Amy and her friends must evade the murderous carnival workers and escape before it leaves town the next day.

programme.title: The Ghost of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Shepherd Igor rescues the monster from a sulfur pit and brings him to Dr. Frankenstein's other son.

programme.title: Halloween II
programme.desc: A killer follows his injured target (Jamie Lee Curtis) to the hospital on Oct. 31 in Haddonfield, Ill.","large":"After failing to kill stubborn survivor Laurie (Jamie Lee Curtis) and taking a bullet or six from former psychiatrist Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), Michael Myers (Jonathan Prince) has followed Laurie to the Haddonfield Memorial Hospital, where she's been admitted for Myers' attempt on her life. The institution proves to be particularly suited to serial killers, however, as Myers cuts, stabs and slashes his way through hospital staff to reach his favorite victim.

programme.title: House of Dracula
programme.desc: A scientist (Onslow Stevens) helps the Wolf Man (Lon Chaney) and Dracula (John Carradine), and revives Frankenstein's monster.","large":"This monster movie focuses on the iconic vampire, Count Dracula (John Carradine), and Lawrence Talbot (Lon Chaney), better known as the Wolf Man. Both beings of the night are tired of their supernatural afflictions, so they seek out Dr. Franz Edelmann (Onslow Stevens) for cures for their respective curses. While trying to aid the imposing creatures, Edelmann himself develops a transformative condition, adding to the many ghouls lurking around the foreboding landscape.

programme.title: House of Frankenstein
programme.desc: A mad doctor (Boris Karloff) and his hunchbacked helper (J. Carrol Naish) revive Dracula, the Wolf Man (Lon Chaney) and the Frankenstein monster.","large":"After escaping from prison, the evil Dr. Niemann (Boris Karloff) and his hunchbacked assistant, Daniel (J. Carrol Naish), plot their revenge against those who imprisoned them. For this, they recruit the powerful Wolf Man (Lon Chaney), Frankenstein's monster (Glenn Strange) and even Dracula himself (John Carradine). Niemann pursues those who wrong him, sending each monster out to do his dirty work. But his control on the monsters is weak at best and may prove to be his downfall.

programme.title: House of Horrors
programme.desc: An insane sculptor sends the disfigured criminal he saved from drowning to kill the critics who denounced him.

programme.title: The Incredible Shrinking Man
programme.desc: Exposure to a mysterious fog causes a man (Grant Williams) to shrink, making the world around him extremely hazardous.","large":"While on a boating trip, Scott Carey (Grant Williams) is exposed to a radioactive cloud. Nothing seems amiss at first, but several months later Scott realizes that he's shrunk in height by several inches. He sees a doctor, who admits that he's baffled. As Scott continues to shrink, decreasing to three feet tall, he becomes bitter, and lashes out at his wife, Louise (Randy Stuart). He begins to fear a cure will never be found -- since even as he becomes a national sensation, he's still shrinking.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: The serum that makes a scientist (Claude Rains) invisible has madness as a side effect.

programme.title: The Invisible Man Returns
programme.desc: A man (Vincent Price) framed for murder uses a serum to become invisible, then escapes to find the killer.","large":"Wrongly accused of murdering his brother, Geoffrey Radcliffe (Vincent Price) is found guilty and sentenced to die. But when sympathetic Dr. Griffin (John Sutton) injects him with a serum that renders him invisible, Radcliffe is able to escape and search for the real culprit. With Inspector Sampson (Cecil Kellaway) of Scotland Yard hot on his trail, Radcliffe begins to suspect that a recent hire in his family's mining company might have the answers he seeks.

programme.title: The Invisible Man's Revenge
programme.desc: A criminal (Jon Hall) haunts his enemies' mansion after a mad scientist (John Carradine) makes him invisible.

programme.title: The Invisible Ray
programme.desc: A scientist (Bela Lugosi) seeks an antidote for a radium-poisoned colleague (Boris Karloff) with the touch of death.

programme.title: The Invisible Woman
programme.desc: A screwy professor's experiments with a gorgeous model attract the attentions of a gangster and a handsome millionaire.

programme.title: Island of Lost Souls
programme.desc: White-suited Dr. Moreau (Charles Laughton) herds his bestial mutants and plots to mate his panther-woman with a visitor (Richard Arlen).","large":"In this adaptation of H.G. Wells' novel "The Island of Doctor Moreau," Edward Parker (Richard Arlen) is shipwrecked on a remote island presided over by the mysterious Dr. Moreau (Charles Laughton). Edward discovers his host is conducting genetic experiments, and presiding over a race of half-human, half-animal hybrids, including the alluring Panther Woman and the sage Sayer of the Law (Bela Lugosi). The island has become its own society, with Moreau as its god.

programme.title: It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Based on a Ray Bradbury short story about an astronomer's encounter with extraterrestrials in the Arizona desert.","large":"While looking through his telescope one night, John Putnam (Richard Carlson) sees what at first appears to be a meteor shower -- but it is actually a crash-landing alien spaceship! After investigating the crater from the impact, John informs the town sheriff (Charles Drake), and receives nothing but ridicule. Even his fiancée, Ellen (Barbara Rush), is skeptical. All that changes when the townsfolk start disappearing, and are replaced by eerie alien duplicates.

programme.title: Kiss of the Vampire
programme.desc: A professor (Clifford Evans) in black rescues stranded 1910 newlyweds from a Bavarian doctor's (Noel Willman) vampire villa.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Hired to find a missing person in New Orleans, a merchant seaman (Jean-Claude Van Damme) becomes the prey of those (Lance Henriksen, Arnold Vosloo) who hunt men for sport.","large":"Chance Boudreaux (Jean-Claude Van Damme), a sailor skilled in martial arts, is employed to guard Natasha Binder (Yancy Butler) as she tracks down her father, an itinerant Vietnam veteran living in New Orleans named Douglas (Chuck Pfarrer). They soon uncover a sinister group of wealthy men who hunt the homeless for sport, paying them $10,000 if they can survive a crosstown journey. When Chance discovers that Natasha's father was one of their victims, he decides to destroy the evil hunters.

programme.title: Hard Target 2
programme.desc: A retired mixed martial artist (Scott Adkins) is offered one final bout, but he learns he has been tricked into becoming the target of a human hunt when he arrives for the fight.

programme.title: Carlito's Way: Rise to Power
programme.desc: A New York gangster (Jay Hernandez) forms an alliance with two criminals to become the most powerful drug kingpin in Spanish Harlem.","large":"After serving time together in prison, three gangsters from different backgrounds -- Carlito (Jay Hernandez), Earl (Mario Van Peebles) and Rocco (Michael Kelly) -- join forces and take over the lucrative heroin trade in Harlem, N.Y. However, their partnership with a gangster (Burt Young) is threatened when Earl's hotheaded little brother, Reggie (Mtume Gant), disrespects the mobster's son and then kidnaps him. A ransom goes out on Reggie's head, and the friends are forced to choose sides.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A mobster's (James Caan) goons pursue a fugitive underling (Adam Sandler) turning state's evidence to an undercover policeman (Damon Wayans) he once shot.","large":"A none-too-bright criminal, Archie Moses (Adam Sandler) works for drug kingpin Frank Colton (James Caan) and remains oblivious to the fact that one of his closest buddies is actually an undercover police officer named Jack Carter (Damon Wayans). After Moses accidentally shoots Carter, the cop must recover and then bring the two-bit thug in to take the stand against Colton. With Carter and Moses on far from good terms, however, the trip does not go well.

programme.title: Assault on Precinct 13
programme.desc: A cop must arm prisoners to help fend off an attack by gunmen who want to kill a gangster locked away in the crumbling station.","large":"While en route to prison, a bus carrying criminals Marion (Laurence Fishburne), Beck (John Leguizamo) and Anna (Aisha Hinds) is rerouted to Detroit's soon-to-be-closed Precinct 13 because of a dangerous winter storm. All communications with the outside world are cut off, and Jake (Ethan Hawke), an emotionally volatile police sergeant who is haunted by his past, is forced to work with the criminals in order to survive an attack on the precinct by a group of armed men.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: A jailed IRA operative (Richard Gere) helps the FBI track a masterful assassin (Bruce Willis) about to perform a political killing.","large":"During an FBI raid on a Moscow nightclub, the brother of Russian gangster Terek Murad (David Hayman) is killed. Murad wants revenge and hires anonymous hit man the Jackal (Bruce Willis) to kill FBI Deputy Director Carter Preston (Sidney Poitier). With the help of Russian agent Valentina Koslova (Diane Venora), Preston finds the only man who knows what the notorious Jackal looks like, imprisoned IRA terrorist Declan Mulqueen (Richard Gere), and forces him to help hunt down the hit man.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: The actions of Jason Bourne spell the possible end of secret intelligence programs, so a specially enhanced operative (Jeremy Renner) goes on the run with a research scientist (Rachel Weisz) when it appears that their lives will become forfeit.","large":"When the actions of Jason Bourne spark a fire that threatens to burn down decades of research across a number of secret intelligence agencies, Eric Byer (Edward Norton), the man who built the programs, decides he must sacrifice one of them: Outcome. Aaron Cross (Jeremy Renner), one of Outcome's six agents, and research scientist Marta Shearing (Rachel Weisz) go on the run when Byer targets them for termination. But Cross proves to be a far deadlier target than Byer realizes.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: A band of samurai sets out to avenge the death and dishonor of their master at the hands of a ruthless shogun.

programme.title: Blade of the 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Ancient Japanese Ronin warriors, set 300 years after 47 Ronin, in a modern-day world where Samurai clans exist in complete secrecy.

programme.title: Riddick
programme.desc: Left for dead on a sun-scorched planet, wanted criminal Riddick must confront two teams of mercenaries, one of whom is led by a man from his past.","large":"Left for dead on a sun-scorched planet, fugitive Riddick fights for survival against alien predators more lethal than any human he has yet encountered. His only hope for escape is to activate an emergency beacon, but that brings with it a different problem: mercenaries. The first ship carries an especially violent and lethal group; the second is led by a man from Riddick's past. With time running out, Riddick realizes that neither group will leave without his head as a trophy.

programme.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
programme.desc: Sent by an evil queen (Charlize Theron) to capture an escaped princess (Kristen Stewart), a huntsman (Chris Hemsworth) instead becomes the young woman's protector and helps her in her quest to regain control of her kingdom.","large":"Queen Ravenna (Charlize Theron), who seized control of her kingdom by marrying and killing its rightful ruler, needs the life force of young maidens to maintain her beauty. However, to become truly immortal, Ravenna must consume the heart of her stepdaughter Snow White (Kristen Stewart). Snow escapes, and Ravenna dispatches a huntsman (Chris Hemsworth) to capture her. But Snow, the Huntsman and a rebel army join forces to destroy Ravenna and restore the balance of life and death.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: A huntsman (Chris Hemsworth) and a fellow warrior (Jessica Chastain) battle an ice queen (Emily Blunt) and her evil, resurrected sister (Charlize Theron).","large":"Betrayed by her evil sister Ravenna (Charlize Theron), heartbroken Freya (Emily Blunt) retreats to a northern kingdom to raise an army of huntsmen as her protectors. Gifted with the ability to freeze her enemies in ice, Freya teaches her young soldiers to never fall in love. When Eric (Chris Hemsworth) and fellow warrior Sara defy this rule, the angry queen does whatever she can to stop them. As war between the siblings escalates, Eric and Sara try to end Ravenna's wicked reign.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: The actions of Jason Bourne spell the possible end of secret intelligence programs, so a specially enhanced operative (Jeremy Renner) goes on the run with a research scientist (Rachel Weisz) when it appears that their lives will become forfeit.","large":"When the actions of Jason Bourne spark a fire that threatens to burn down decades of research across a number of secret intelligence agencies, Eric Byer (Edward Norton), the man who built the programs, decides he must sacrifice one of them: Outcome. Aaron Cross (Jeremy Renner), one of Outcome's six agents, and research scientist Marta Shearing (Rachel Weisz) go on the run when Byer targets them for termination. But Cross proves to be a far deadlier target than Byer realizes.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: A band of samurai sets out to avenge the death and dishonor of their master at the hands of a ruthless shogun.

programme.title: Blade of the 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Ancient Japanese Ronin warriors, set 300 years after 47 Ronin, in a modern-day world where Samurai clans exist in complete secrecy.

programme.title: Riddick
programme.desc: Left for dead on a sun-scorched planet, wanted criminal Riddick must confront two teams of mercenaries, one of whom is led by a man from his past.","large":"Left for dead on a sun-scorched planet, fugitive Riddick fights for survival against alien predators more lethal than any human he has yet encountered. His only hope for escape is to activate an emergency beacon, but that brings with it a different problem: mercenaries. The first ship carries an especially violent and lethal group; the second is led by a man from Riddick's past. With time running out, Riddick realizes that neither group will leave without his head as a trophy.

programme.title: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: Trouble follows an architect's (Wesley Snipes) biracial affair with a woman (Annabella Sciorra) in New York.","large":"A married black lawyer named Flipper (Wesley Snipes) begins an affair with Angie (Annabella Sciorra), his white secretary. When the news is leaked through an acquaintance, Flipper's wife (Lonette McKee) kicks him out of the house. Flipper decides to begin courting his mistress, only to be greeted by disapproval from friends, family and even strangers. The relationship continues to be strained in a society not ready to accept it, and people are hurt during its inception.

programme.title: Queen & Slim
programme.desc: Slim and Queen's first date takes an unexpected turn when one shoots a policeman during a routine traffic stop. Now labeled cop killers in the media, the unwitting outlaws feel that they have no choice but to go on the run and evade the law.","large":"Slim and Queen's first date takes an unexpected turn when a policeman pulls them over for a minor traffic violation. When the situation escalates, Slim takes the officer's gun and shoots him in self-defense. Now labeled cop killers in the media, Slim and Queen feel that they have no choice but to go on the run and evade the law. When a video of the incident goes viral, the unwitting outlaws soon become a symbol of trauma, terror, grief and pain for people all across the country.

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: An inexperienced college student (Dakota Johnson) begins a daring affair with a controlling businessman (Jamie Dornan) whose sexual proclivities push the boundaries of pain and pleasure.","large":"When college senior Anastasia Steele (Dakota Johnson) steps in for her sick roommate to interview prominent businessman Christian Grey (Jamie Dornan) for their campus paper, little does she realize the path her life will take. Christian, as enigmatic as he is rich and powerful, finds himself strangely drawn to Ana, and she to him. Though sexually inexperienced, Ana plunges headlong into an affair -- and learns that Christian's true sexual proclivities push the boundaries of pain and pleasure.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Shadowy figures from Christian Grey's past threaten to destroy his rekindled romance with Anastasia Steele.","large":"When a wounded Christian Grey tries to entice a cautious Anastasia Steele back into his life, she demands a new arrangement before she will give him another chance. As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian's past start to circle them, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Believing they've left behind the shadowy figures from the past, Christian Grey and his new wife, Anastasia, fully embrace their inextricable connection -- until sinister events start to jeopardize their happy ending before it even begins.","large":"Believing they've left behind the shadowy figures from the past, billionaire Christian Grey and his new wife, Anastasia, fully embrace their inextricable connection and shared life of luxury. Just as the Greys begin to step into their new roles, sinister events come to light and jeopardize their happy ending before it even begins.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: A middle-class man (Steve Martin), his wife (Mary Steenburgen), his father and a divorcee (Dianne Wiest) try to be good parents.","large":"Perfectionist Gil Buckman (Steve Martin) struggles with the deficiencies of his children, thinking they reflect poorly on his parenting -- and Gil's siblings only add to the stress of his life. One of his sisters (Dianne Wiest) faces difficulty when her teenage daughter (Martha Plimpton) becomes pregnant. Another (Harley Jane Kozak) clashes with her husband (Rick Moranis) when she asks for more children. Gil's immature brother (Tom Hulce) turns up as well, with a young son he can barely handle.

programme.title: The Kids Are All Right
programme.desc: The teenage children of a lesbian couple (Julianne Moore, Annette Bening) seek out their biological father (Mark Ruffalo) and make him a part of their lives.","large":"Lesbian couple Jules (Julianne Moore) and Nic (Annette Bening) have been together for almost 20 years and have two teenage offspring named Joni and Laser, who were conceived via artificial insemination. Unbeknown to their mothers, Joni and Laser seek out their biological father, a restaurateur named Paul (Mark Ruffalo). Complications arise when the teens bond with Paul and invite him into their lives.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: A man (Ben Stiller) fears the worst when he accompanies his fiancée's uptight father (Robert De Niro) and mother to meet his free-spirited mom and dad (Dustin Hoffman).","large":"Now that Greg Focker is "in" with his soon-to-be in-laws, Jack and Dina Byrnes, it looks like smooth sailing for him and his fiancée, Pam. But that's before Pam's parents meet Greg's parents, the Fockers. The hyper-relaxed Fockers and the tightly-wound Byrnes are woefully mismatched from the start, and no matter how hard Greg and Pam try, there is just no bringing their families together. This all adds up to a disastrously funny time of getting to know you.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: When a woman brings her boyfriend home for her sister's wedding, her father, a former CIA agent, takes an instant dislike to him.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: As two clans descend on the scene of young twins' birthday, Greg Focker's moonlighting at a pharmaceutical company threatens to derail his position of trust with Jack, his uptight father-in-law.","large":"After 10 years of marriage and two children, it seems that Greg Focker has finally earned a place in the "circle of trust" of his uptight father-in-law, Jack. However, Greg is moonlighting with a drug company, which raises Jack's suspicions. As two clans descend on the scene of the young twins' birthday party, Greg must find a way through myriad misunderstandings to prove to Jack -- once and for all -- that he is worthy of being the next family patriarch.

programme.title: A Flying Jatt
programme.desc: Starring: Tiger Shroff,Jacqueline Fernandez. Aman, a martial arts teacher, discovers his superpowers during a fight with Raka. After Raka gains strength from toxic waste, Aman must defeat him.

programme.title: Holiday (2006)
programme.desc: A plain, unpopular girl (Onjolee Nair) with failure issues falls in love with a charismatic dance instructor (Dino Morea).

programme.title: Bhaje Vaayu Vegam
programme.desc: Starring: Tanikella Bharani,Krishna Chaitanya. A budding cricketer bets big to fund his father's surgery but is betrayed by a bookie. Seeking revenge, he lands on a crime website, facing unexpected dangers that test his resolve.

programme.title: Mahaabali
programme.desc: Starring: Bellamkonda Sreenivas,Samantha Ruth Prabhu. A man and his uncle seek sanctuary, love, and identity, using uncle's resemblance to local don in Hyderabad.

programme.title: Geeta Govinda
programme.desc: Starring: Deverakonda, Rashmika Mandanna. An innocent young lecturer is misunderstood as a pervert and despised by a woman who co-incidentally turns out to be the younger sister of his brother-in-law.

programme.title: Kerala Story
programme.desc: Kerala Story

programme.title: Middle Class Love
programme.desc: Starring: Eisha Singh,Kavya Thapar. A young college boy, weary of his middle class life, sees love as his escape from it, hoping for a different and more fulfilling future.

programme.title: Saand Ki Aankh
programme.desc: Starring: Taapsee Pannu,Nikhat Khan. Chandro and Prakashi accidentally discover their shooting skills. With the help of an instructor, they participate in various competitions.

programme.title: Kakuda
programme.desc: Starring: Riteish Deshmukh,Sonakshi Sinha. Haunted by a village curse predicting her husband's death in thirteen days, a newlywed bride seeks a ghost hunter's help to save the man she loves desperately tonight.

programme.title: Kick
programme.desc: Starring: Ravi Teja,Ileana. Naina leaves wanderer Kalyan and agrees to wed a cop, only to discover he is after Kalyan, pulling her back into turmoil.

programme.title: Sikandar
programme.desc: Starring: Parzan Dastur,Ayesha Kapoor. Sikandar, a 14-year-old Kashmiri, finds a gun, setting off a series of events that entwine him in the complexities of militancy, politics, and tragedy.

programme.title: Hum Aapke Hain Koun
programme.desc: Starring: Madhuri Dixit,Salman Khan. Prem madly loves Nisha, his brother Rajesh's sister-in-law. But when Rajesh's wife dies, the families urge him to marry Nisha for the sake of his baby. Prem and Nisha decide to sacrifice their love.

programme.title: Dabangg
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonakshi Sinha. Chulbul Pandey faces off against Baccha Singh, a local goon and aspiring politician. The conflict escalates when Chulbul kills Baccha Singh's younger brother, intensifying their personal vendetta.

programme.title: De De Pyaar De 2
programme.desc: Starring: Ajay Devgn,R. Madhavan. London-based NRI investor Ashish Mehra visits his girlfriend's family to seek approval for their relationship. Trouble begins when her father discovers Ashish's actual age.

programme.title: Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki Jaan
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Pooja Hegde. Bhaijaan won marry to keep family peace. His brothers secretly spark romance, leading to funny twists, heartfelt moments, and unexpected love.

programme.title: Parmanu: The Story Of Pokhran
programme.desc: Starring: John Abraham,Diana Penty. Ashwat, an IAS officer, leads a secret mission to make nuclear weapons. He must keep it hidden from American spies while handling tricky diplomatic situations.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Starring: Kangana Ranaut,Vishak Nair. The story of Indira Gandhi unfolds, showcasing key moments from her personal and political life as India's most powerful stateswoman.

programme.title: Ghajini
programme.desc: Starring: Aamir Khan,Asin Thottumkal. After a brutal attack, Sanjay's memory resets every fifteen minutes. Armed with tattooed notes, he seeks his fiancee's killer, navigating a labyrinth of clues before time resets his investigation.

programme.title: Koi Mil Gaya
programme.desc: Starring: Hrithik Roshan,Priety Zinta. Rohit, a specially-abled boy, befriends an alien. Police pursue the extraterrestrial, testing Rohit's resolve to protect his newfound friend.

programme.title: Gadar 2
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Ameesha Patel. When Tara Singh goes missing during a skirmish and is believed to be captured in Pakistan, his son Jeete sets out to rescue him and enters a labyrinth from which they both must escape at all costs.

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: Starring: Ranveer Singh,Sonu Sood. Simmba's living the crooked cop dream-until a woman's assault flips his world. Now, he's ditching the cash, picking up courage, and going head-to-head with his powerful, criminal boss.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Starring: Jeet,Biswajit Chakraborty. Raja is hired to shoot a party leader but is instructed not to kill him. When the politician ends up getting killed by an unknown assassin, Raja becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Commando 3
programme.desc: Starring: Vidyut Jammwal,Adah Sharma. Officers Karan and Bhavana embark on a high-stakes mission to London, racing against time to stop a terrorist plot threatening their homeland, India.

programme.title: Andaaz
programme.desc: Andaaz

programme.title: Pushpa 2
programme.desc: A daring smuggler named Pushpa expands his illegal empire, craving power and respect on a vengeful quest, while confronting familiar rivals and fresh threats along the way.

programme.title: Waris
programme.desc: Frustrated by the king's behaviour, the queen leaves the kingdom with her son. Years later, when the king dies, the officials search for his son.

programme.title: Kudrat Ka Kanoon
programme.desc: Vijay tries to protect the people from a tyrannical local chief but is falsely accused of murder and imprisoned. His wife is also pursued by hooligans.

programme.title: Anokha Bandhan
programme.desc: After his mother dies, a woman is asked to look after her brother-in-law. She agrees to care for him, leading to unexpected challenges and changes in their relationship.

programme.title: Desh Premee
programme.desc: A freedom fighter thrown out from his village takes shelter with four crooks. He tries to unite them, unaware that they are taking advantage of him.

programme.title: Johny I Love You
programme.desc: Johnny's romance turns complicated when love collides with secrets, danger and unexpected betrayals that change everything.

programme.title: Keemat
programme.desc: Sudha goes undercover on Gopal's instructions to put an end to a human trafficking business that abducts young women. But they are unaware that the assignment is compromised and poses a grave risk.

programme.title: Patita
programme.desc: Radha runs away after Nirmal makes all the arrangements for their marriage. Later, Nirmal finds her staying at Mastram's house with a child.

programme.title: My Life My Story
programme.desc: RJ Anmol chats with Bollywood stars who share real stories, emotional memories, and funny moments from their lives. A candid and heartwarming glimpse into stardom.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: Vishal's fling with Roma threatens his marriage with Anjali. A mysterious stranger targets him, leading to suspense, blackmail, and a painful dilemma of love and betrayal.

programme.title: Shirdi Ke Sai Baba
programme.desc: A doctor has no faith in the powers of Sai Baba. However, his wife and he travel to Shirdi when their son falls sick. After hearing certain stories of Sai Baba, the doctor develops faith in him.

programme.title: Pyar Ke Kaabil
programme.desc: Ramesh struggles to prove his worth as love, social status and family expectations challenge his relationship with Rekha.

programme.title: Beta Ho To Aisa
programme.desc: In a gripping tale of betrayal and loss, Laxmi navigates a treacherous world after her husband's murder, as family ties unravel and justice becomes a distant hope for her daughter, Asha.

programme.title: Khel Khilari Ka
programme.desc: A skilled player enters high-stakes conflicts, using intelligence and bravery to overcome rivals and hidden threats.

programme.title: Pyar Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Raj and Pooja's romance faces obstacles as misunderstandings, emotions and family pressures threaten their happiness.

programme.title: Anita
programme.desc: Neeraj's world shatters when his love, Anita, seemingly commits suicide after a botched elopement. As he uncovers her mysterious past, he's haunted by her ghost-truth or madness?

programme.title: Hum Hindustaani
programme.desc: The Nath Family Faces Hard Times Because Of A Property Dispute And When One Of The Sons In The Family Is Accused Of Theft.

programme.title: Woh 7 Din
programme.desc: Dr Anand learns that his new bride loves someone else. He decides to re-unite the two lovers at all costs and begins to search for the man.

programme.title: Kab Tak Chup Rahungi
programme.desc: On her trip to a remote and scenic village, Geeta meets Gopal, a local guide. The two fall in love but she is forcefully married to a rich industrialist who does not respect her.

programme.title: Main Tulsi Tere Aangan Ki
programme.desc: The story of a woman who switched roles from being a prostitute to being a most loving mother to a child who is not even her own.

programme.title: Aman
programme.desc: Dr Gautamdas help those devastated by the atom bomb explosions in Hiroshima and Nagasaki, and falls in love with the beautiful Meloda.

programme.title: Jigri Dost
programme.desc: Shankar and Gopal's friendship is tested by misunderstandings, family tensions and emotional sacrifices over time.

programme.title: Khatron Ke Khiladi
programme.desc: Balwant breaks free from prison, fueled by a desire for revenge against those who murdered his brother. He's on a mission to settle the score and find justice.

programme.title: Sahib Bahadur
programme.desc: Greedy town officials bribe locals to stay rich, but their luck runs out when Prem Pratap, undercover government agent, arrives to investigate and expose corruption.

programme.title: C.I.D.
programme.desc: Shrivastav attempts to expose a rich man's link to the underworld but gets killed in the process. When his friend Inspector Shekhar tries to find the killer, he himself becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Chameli Ki Shaadi
programme.desc: Charandas and Chameli fall in love. As events spiral out of control, he must find a way out to get her father's approval for marriage.

programme.title: Bulandi
programme.desc: In Bharatpur, Thakurs wield village justice. A rape-and-murder case pits Dada Thakur against his own brother Arjun, risking life for a fair verdict.

programme.title: Mili
programme.desc: Curmudgeonly Shekhar (Amitabh Bachchan) is new to the block, and it doesn't take long before the street noise, as well as the children playing nearby, push his tolerance to the limit. To the rescue comes Mili (Suresh Chatwal), who has the exact opposite disposition. While Shekhar may be at a loss over what to do with her at first, he eventually falls in love. Unfortunately, when the time comes to ask for her hand, he finds out Mili has a fatal medical condition and only has a few weeks to live.

programme.title: Krishna Cottage
programme.desc: The movie revolves around a group of college students who visit a haunted house called "Krishna Cottage." As they unravel the mystery behind the house, they uncover dark secrets and a vengeful spirit that haunts them

programme.title: Dost
programme.desc: Two brothers reunite in order to fulfil the wish of their dying father whom Thakur bitterly humiliates and murders. They intend to marry Thakur's two daughters to seek revenge.

programme.title: Pitaara
programme.desc: Punjabi Movie Songs

programme.title: Kaato Kaahto
programme.desc: Kaato Kaahto

programme.title: Bluffmaster
programme.desc: Ace con artist Roy leads a double life, convincing his girlfriend Simmi he is an ordinary, honest guy. However, when she discovers the truth, he is powerless to save their relationship. After collapsing on the street, Roy discovers he has a brain tumour and hasn't long to live. Before it is too late, his partner and disciple Dittu persuades Roy to take part in one last master plan.

programme.title: Masti
programme.desc: Three henpecked friends tired of their respective marriage decide to spice up their lives by indulging in an extramarital affair. But things go downhill very quickly when they become the prime suspects in a deadly murder case.
